Heritage World Coin Auctions - Showcase Auction 61557, Lot 25029 — Ancients
Maurice Tiberius (AD 582-602). AE follis or 40 nummi (32mm, 6h). NGC VF. Theoupolis (Antioch), dated Regnal Year 5 (AD 586/7). ΠINΛIOC S - TIANTAPPV, facing bust of Maurice Tiberius in consul
sales.description:
Ancients
Maurice Tiberius (AD 582-602). AE follis or 40 nummi (32mm, 6h). NGC VF. Theoupolis (Antioch), dated Regnal Year 5 (AD 586/7). ΠINΛIOC S - TIANTAPPV, facing bust of Maurice Tiberius in consular robes, wearing crown with pendilia and trefoil ornament, mappa in right hand, scepter surmounted by eagle in left / Large M (mark of value); A/N/N/O in left field, Ϥ (date) in right field, cross above, tHEuP' in exergue. Sear 532.

From the A Pugnus Maximus Collection by Mandy Farris Woods.  ww...

sales.description:
Ancients
Maurice Tiberius (AD 582-602). AE follis or 40 nummi (28mm, 1h). NGC Choice VF. Theoupolis (Antioch), 3rd officina, dated Regnal Year 14 (AD 595/6). d N mAur-N P AuT, facing bust of Maurice Tiberius in consular robes, wearing crown with pendilia and trefoil ornament, mappa in right hand, scepter surmounted by eagle in left / Large M (mark of value); A/N/N/O to left, X/IIII to right, cross above, Γ below, tHEuP' in exergue. Sear 533.

From the A Pugnus Maximus Collection by Mandy Farri...
